title: config.rs: example comment missing proxy field
description: The AppConfig doc comment in cli/src/config.rs (lines 26-28) shows an example config.toml with relay and lightwalletd fields but not the new proxy field. A user reading the source or generated rustdoc to learn how to configure a Tor proxy would not find the proxy field here. Fix: add a proxy line (commented out) to the example block, e.g.: proxy = 'socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050' with a note about socks5h for .onion.
